name: JavaScript eval()
description: Detects use of eval() in JavaScript.
suggestion: Avoid using eval() as it is a major security risk and performance bottleneck.

name: Missing Semicolon (JS)
description: Detects missing semicolons at the end of statements in JavaScript.
suggestion: Add a semicolon at the end of the statement for better clarity and to avoid ASI issues.

name: Assignment in Condition
description: Detects assignment (=) instead of comparison (==) in if/while conditions.
message: Potential Syntax Error: Assignment '=' used in condition.
suggestion: Use '==' or '===' for comparison inside the condition.

name: Unresolved TODOs
message: Unresolved TODO or FIXME comments found.
suggestion: Address the pending task or remove the comment if it's no longer relevant.
